summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a jazzy, vocal‑less China Cat Sunflower from 7/12 with crystal‑clear audio.
review: Reviewers rave about this recording’s pristine soundboard quality and highlight an unusual three‑minute jazzy solo intro that leads into a vocal‑free rendition of “China Cat Sunflower.” The performance is described as one of the most amazing moments of the show, and no technical flaws are reported.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave high ratings (5★ and 4★) and praised the performance; the soundboard source suggests excellent audio quality, but only two reviews limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp mix with no reported drop‑outs or muddiness; reviewers specifically note the jazzy solo is well heard.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Features an unusual instrumental version of China Cat Sunflower with a three‑minute jazzy solo intro and no vocals, making it a highlight of the set.
